problem id: ac145047
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  01010101 -> 00001010
  00101010 -> 00010001
  11001001 -> 01101110
  11101001 -> 01101111
  01011111 -> 00011010
  11100011 -> 01111111
  11000000 -> 00000110
  11001100 -> 11100110
  10001100 -> 11100100
  00100100 -> 10100001

query: 00000010
predicted answer: 01010000
